support_project_id.title: Support Project ID
support_project_id.description: Project ID used by the support assistant for conversations. Auto-created if left empty.

support_agent_project_id.title: Agent Project ID
support_agent_project_id.description: Project ID where the support agent is located.

support_agent_id.title: Agent ID
support_agent_id.description: Application ID of the support agent.

support_welcome_message.title: Welcome Message
support_welcome_message.description: Initial greeting message shown in the support widget.
support_welcome_message.default: Hello! How can I help you today?

support_assistant_name.title: Assistant Name
support_assistant_name.description: Display name for the support assistant.
